title: Heavy Duty Appliance Packing: Securing Dual-Door Refrigerators and Deep Freezers for Cobblestone Transit
excerpt: Pack dual-door refrigerators deep freezers: heavy appliance moving, cobblestone transit, upright transport, strap protocol, Addis Ababa appliance relocation safety.
content:
Heavy duty appliance packing: securing dual-door refrigerators and deep freezers for cobblestone transit

Dual-door refrigerators and deep freezers are household anchors—150 to 300 kilos of compressor, glass, and spoiled-food risk if tilted wrong on Piassa cobble. Heavy appliance packing is physics: upright always, doors secured, coils protected, and truck position low-forward strapped against stop-and-go jolt.

This guide secures dual-door refrigerators and deep freezers for cobblestone transit in Addis.

Pre-move preparation

  • Empty all contents—weight and spill risk.
  • Defrost freezer 24–48 hours; towel residual water.
  • Clean and dry interior—mold during transit.
  • Disconnect power; coil dust vacuumed.
  • Measure doorways and path—may need door removal from fridge or house.

Manufacturer transport rules

Read manual: transport screws for compressor isolation often required—missing hardware causes warranty void. Apply transit bolts if specified. Upright orientation mandatory most units—laying down oil enters lines.

Packing and wrapping

Doors taped shut not tight enough to seal—bulge allows pressure release. Cardboard corners on edges; blanket wrap full body. Handles padded—snap under strap. Ice maker lines capped.

Loading and strapping

Appliance dolly vertical; two-person minimum; ramp walk controlled. Truck: against bulkhead low; two ratchet straps minimum; third head-to-wall if available. Never stack cartons on fridge door.

Cobblestone ride discipline

Driver slow over stones; driver avoids pothole slam. Mid-truck position reduces tailgate whip. Short tie-down check after first rough segment.

Destination rest before power

Stand upright 2–4 hours manual typical before plug-in—oil settle. Level unit; remove transit bolts; verify door seal before restock.

Insurance

Declare appliance age and value; note pre-existing dent photos.

Active Movers appliance tier

Disclose dual-door and floor level—dolly crew and strap count in quote.

Conclusion

Secure refrigerators and deep freezers upright, defrosted, transit-bolted, and low-forward strapped—cobblestone transit succeeds when compressor physics respected, not rushed.
author: Active Movers Team
